title: matricaria maritima var. inodora
intro: Matricaria maritima var. inodora is a subspecies of the Matricaria chamomilla plant, commonly known as the lesser chamomile or wild chamomile. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Matricaria maritima var. inodora include soothing digestive problems, reducing anxiety and insomnia, and alleviating skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
